hero.name: Rao Muhammad Ali
hero.body: I engineer quality into every line of code — breaking systems so your users never have to. From automated test suites to performance benchmarks, I make sure software ships with confidence.
hero.tagline: Ensuring quality through precision testing and automation
hero.title: Software Quality Assurance Engineer

about.heading: About Me
about.body:
I'm a passionate Software Development Engineer in Test with hands-on experience designing and executing automated test frameworks, API validation suites, and performance stress tests across complex, data-driven platforms. My background spans QA engineering, front-end development, and software engineering — giving me a full-stack perspective on where bugs hide and how to catch them before they reach production.

I thrive in fast-paced environments where quality is non-negotiable. Whether I'm scripting end-to-end flows in Playwright, stress-testing APIs with JMeter, or collaborating with developers to shift testing left, my goal is always the same: deliver software that works flawlessly for every user, every time.
about.para1: Software Quality Assurance Engineer with hands-on expertise in modern testing techniques and a deep understanding of the software development lifecycle. Specialized in functional, regression, usability, compatibility, and exploratory testing.
about.para2: Proficient with industry-standard tools like Postman and JMeter for API and performance validation. Committed to identifying issues early and enabling smooth, reliable releases through meticulous quality assurance.

skills.body: A curated toolkit built through real-world QA engineering — every badge represents a tool I've used to ship higher-quality software.
skills.subheading: API Testing, Test Automation, Performance Testing, QA Methodologies

projects.subheading: Test automation, API validation, and quality assurance initiatives.

education.heading: Education
education.body: A strong software engineering foundation that underpins every testing strategy and automation decision I make.
education.description: Comprehensive training in QA methodologies, test automation, and quality assurance best practices.

certifications.body: Credentials that validate both my technical expertise and my commitment to continuous professional growth.

awards.heading: Awards & Leadership
awards.body: Leadership roles and recognitions that reflect my drive to contribute beyond the codebase — building communities and developing peers.

contact.heading: Let's Connect
contact.body: Whether you're looking for a dedicated SDET to join your team, want to collaborate on a QA project, or just want to talk testing — my inbox is always open.
contact.ctaBody: Let's connect and discuss how I can contribute to your team's quality assurance goals.
contact.subheading: Reach out for collaboration, questions, or opportunities.
